about.title: Over 10 years at your service
about.subtitle: Saffron Electronics was born from the vision of making quality home appliances accessible to all Ivorian households.
about.p1: Founded over 10 years ago, Saffron Electronics has established itself as one of the key references in home appliances in Abidjan. Our showroom, located at the Riviera Palmeraie roundabout near BICICI, welcomes hundreds of customers every day.
about.p2: We offer a complete range of home appliances: refrigerators, air conditioners, washing machines, televisions, and a wide selection of small appliances. All our products are sourced from the world's best brands and come with the manufacturer's warranty.
about.p3: Our commitment: to offer you the best products at the best prices, with exceptional customer service. Regular promotions of up to 40% discount further strengthen our accessibility.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide each of our actions

quality.title: Quality
quality.desc: We select only original products from the world's best brands, guaranteeing performance and durability.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: Over a decade of loyal service to Ivorian households. Our reputation is built on honesty and transparency.

service.title: Service
service.desc: From showroom reception to after-sales service, our team is always available to assist you.

price.title: Competitive prices
price.desc: We negotiate the best rates to offer you unbeatable prices without compromising on quality.

footer.description: Your home appliance specialist in Abidjan for over 10 years. Quality, service and competitive prices.
